feed.title: Nathan Adkins
feed.subtitle: I am a Senior at West Virginia University pursing a degree in Computer Engineering. I am currently serving as Algorithms Team Lead on the WVU University Rover Challenge Team, leading software development and robot autonomy development for my third year in a row. I am highly interested in robotics and software development, and I am seeking a full time position in those areas. .

entry.title: test
entry.summary: This is the first blog post
